name: HOLIDAY INN EXPRESS HOTEL AND SUITES

violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee was observed putting on gloves without washing her hands first. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Food employee was observed drinking beverage in the kitchen. Beverages should not be consumed in food prep areas.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Test strips were not available for checking the sanitizing concentration of the sanitizer in the 3 compartment sink and other sanitizers. Test strips should be available to assure proper strength is used for sanitizing equipment.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
